_note: PHASE 2 - eval (v2 spec set) for the calibrated + p95-tuned 2D GORGO model. ms-normalized model: score = rtt_weight*rtt_ms + prefill_rate*uncached + queue_rate*queue_weight*queued. Sequencer patches the calibrated prefill_rate/queue_rate (from PHASE 0) AND the learned rtt_weight/queue_weight (from PHASE 1) into gorgo-static-p95-2d. Single gorgo policy: gorgo-static-p95-2d (the calibrate->tune->eval pipeline replaces the old live-autotune-during-eval approach). The baked hyperparameters are best-known defaults (calibrated rates P~=0.057/Q~=0.008; reasoned weights rtt~=0.2/queue~=1.3) used only when run standalone (--skip-calib --skip-tuning without prior phases). Window: apr7 19:45-20:15 (decoded eval).

policies._note: Placeholder weights/rates are best-known defaults; the sequencer patches calibrated rates (prefill_rate/queue_rate) + learned weights (rtt_weight/queue_weight) when run as the full pipeline.
policies.name: gorgo-2d
policies.label: gorgo-static-p95-2d
